name: ButtonGroup

examples.title: Horizontal (default)
examples.code:
<ButtonGroup>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bold" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Italic" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Underline" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
</ButtonGroup>

mdSummary:
# ButtonGroup
